ddls:
CREATE TABLE "casualty_statistics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded statistics */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of killing incidents */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "total_incidents_by_month" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents by month */,
  "civilians_killed" INTEGER /* Number of civilians killed */,
  "security_forces_killed" INTEGER /* Number of security forces killed */,
  "terrorists_killed" INTEGER /* Number of terrorists/insurgents/extremists killed */,
  "unspecified_killed" INTEGER /* Number of victims whose status is not specified */,
  "total_killed" INTEGER /* Total number of victims killed */,
  "civilians_injured" INTEGER /* Number of civilians injured */,
  "security_forces_injured" INTEGER /* Number of security forces injured */,
  "terrorists_injured" INTEGER /* Number of terrorists/insurgents/extremists injured */,
  "unspecified_injured" INTEGER /* Number of victims whose status is not specified and injured */,
  "total_injured" INTEGER /* Total number of victims injured */,
  "total_affected" INTEGER /* Total number of people affected (killed and injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident happened */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., bombing, shooting, kidnapping) */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the incident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries in the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES casualty_statistics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victim_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim category */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims in the category for the incident */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Number of male victims in the category for the incident */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Number of female victims in the category for the incident */,
  "children_count" INTEGER /* Number of child victims in the category for the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incident_details ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_victims_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES victim_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser or application) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES casualty_statistics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Word document) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incident_details ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser or application) used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data analyzed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "analysis_format" TEXT /* Format of the analysis (e.g., PDF, Excel spreadsheet) */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES casualty_statistics ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the analyst belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the analyst */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
